title: SessionCheckpoint
description: Schema for agentic session checkpoint files written to .governance/checkpoints/ during the Context Capacity Shutdown Protocol. These files enable session resumption after context resets.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the checkpoint was written.

branch.description: Git branch name at the time of checkpoint.

issues_completed.description: Issues completed in this session (e.g., ['#42', '#43']). Array length is the session issue counter.

prs_resolved.description: PRs resolved (merged or escalated) in this session.

issues_remaining.description: Issues identified as actionable but not yet started. Must be re-validated on resume (issue state may have changed).

prs_remaining.description: Open PRs that were not resolved before shutdown.

current_issue.description: Issue that was in progress when shutdown was triggered. Null if shutdown occurred between issues.

current_step.description: The startup.md step that was active at shutdown (e.g., 'Step 7a — Wait for CI Checks').

git_state.description: Git working tree state. Must be 'clean' for a valid checkpoint — dirty checkpoints indicate the shutdown protocol was not completed correctly.

pending_work.description: Human-readable description of what remains to be done.

manifests_written.description: Run manifest IDs written during this session.

review_cycle.description: Current review cycle number if shutdown occurred during Step 7 (PR monitoring). Null otherwise.

session_id.description: Session identifier (e.g., '20260227-session-7'). Used for correlating checkpoints across context resets within a logical session.

context_capacity.description: Context capacity state at checkpoint time. Enables diagnostic analysis of shutdown triggers and capacity trends across sessions.

tier.description: Context capacity tier at checkpoint time per the four-tier model.

tool_calls.description: Number of tool calls made in the session at checkpoint time.

turn_count.description: Number of chat turns (exchanges) in the session at checkpoint time.

issues_completed_count.description: Number of issues completed in the session at checkpoint time.

platform.description: Platform the session is running on. Determines which capacity signals are available.

trigger.description: Human-readable description of what triggered the shutdown (e.g., 'tool_calls > 80', 'session_cap_reached').

context_gates_passed.description: Phase-by-phase gate decisions recording context capacity tier at each pipeline phase transition. Enables trend analysis for capacity planning.

phase.description: Pipeline phase number (0 = checkpoint restore, 1 = pre-flight, 2 = planning, 3 = dispatch, 4 = evaluation, 5 = merge).

tier.description: Context capacity tier at this phase transition.

action.description: Action taken based on the tier (e.g., 'proceed', 'no_new_dispatches', 'checkpoint_and_clear', 'emergency_stop').
